mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 220 in the CPIAUCSL series signals central bank inaction, leading to real rate compression and negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 220.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and payroll employment (PAYEMS) signals robust supply-side expansion, driving positive equity returns through improved corporate earnings visibility.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.05 for any 3-year window where both INDPRO and PAYEMS show positive momentum.

mechanism_narrative: In high unemployment regimes (UNRATE > 8%), rising payroll employment signals labor market recovery, generating positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX fails to produce positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE exceeds 8% and PAYEMS shows positive momentum.

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts (HOUST) combined with expanding GDP (GDPC1) indicate robust demand conditions, driving positive equity returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.05 for any 3-year window where both HOUST and GDPC1 show positive momentum.

mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates above 2% signal tightening monetary policy, increasing discount rates and producing negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 2%.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) indicates strong supply-side capacity utilization, driving positive equity returns through improved corporate margins.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window despite positive INDPRO trends.

mechanism_narrative: High inflation (CPIAUCSL) combined with low rates (FEDFUNDS) creates monetary policy uncertainty, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL > 220 and FEDFUNDS < 1%.
